channel.title: Chengdu on EICP-LAB
channel.description: Recent content in Chengdu on EICP-LAB

item.title: the Third China Energy and Climate Finance 30 Forum
item.description: Professor Yangsiyu Lu was invited to attend the Third China Energy and Climate Finance 30 Forum, where she delivered a presentation titled “Shine on Small Mines: Size-Based Economic Effects of Coal Mine Closure” in the Outstanding Young Scholars Sub-Forum.
